docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,487.51 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, DONALD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, DONALD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST, DONALD $3,487.51 PRINCIPAL, $25.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,513.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO DONALD WEST RETURNED.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $276.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,957.67 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, DONALD
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, DONALD
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, DONALD
